div.h1: Multishot Accept — Single SQE, Multiple CQEs

p.em: Intel Manual Quality Technical Specification v1.0

div.p: Implementation Critical: If -EMFILE or -ENFILE is returned in CQE.res, F_MORE will be 0. The application must clear file descriptor pressure and resubmit the multishot SQE.

ul.li: User must submit new SQE for every incoming connection
